name: Dissolve
summary: Reveals or removes a sprite with a noisy glowing edge.
description: Uses animated value noise as a threshold mask. A colored edge follows the dissolve boundary, making the effect suitable for spawning, destruction, teleportation, and magical transitions.

uniforms.name: progress
uniforms.description: Dissolve progress: 0 keeps the sprite, 1 removes it.

uniforms.name: noiseScale
uniforms.description: Scale of the procedural noise pattern.

uniforms.name: edgeWidth
uniforms.description: Width of the colored dissolve edge.

uniforms.name: edgeColor
uniforms.description: RGBA color of the dissolve edge.
